EmailTemplate.description: Email from lessee to lessor seeking approval of the utilization report
EmailTemplate.name: Utilization Report Approval Request
EmailTemplate.subject: Request: Utilization Report For {!leaseworks__Aircraft__c.Name} For {!leaseworks__Utilization_Report__c.Name} Has Been Submitted For Approval
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
Utilization report for aircraft (MSN {!leaseworks__Aircraft__c.leaseworks__MSN_Number__c}) for {!leaseworks__Utilization_Report__c.leaseworks__Month_Ending__c} has been submitted for your approval. Your urgent attention to this matter is sincerely appreciated.
Yours sincerely, Company Management
